comments.body:
Confirmed: current `main` does **not** yet match those requested defaults.

- `AGENT_AUTOMATION_MODE` currently falls back to `disabled` in [`agent-entrypoint.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-entrypoint.yml#L56), [`agent-label.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-label.yml#L37), and [`agent-approve.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-approve.yml#L84).
- `AGENT_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_APPLY_LABELS` currently defaults to `false` in the project-manager workflow input/config path and CLI fallback: [`agent-project-manager.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-project-manager.yml#L16-L19), [`agent-project-manager.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-project-manager.yml#L84-L86), [`apply-project-management-labels.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/apply-project-management-labels.ts#L35-L36).

Recommended implementation:
- Change automation fallbacks from `disabled` to `agent`.
- Change project-management apply-label defaults from `false` to `true`.
- Update docs in [`configuration-list.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/docs/customization/configuration-list.md#L11-L17) to state:
  - `AGENT_AUTOMATION_MODE` defaults to `agent`; set `heuristics` to save cost.
  - `AGENT_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_APPLY_LABELS` defaults to `true`.
- Keep noting that label writes still require dry-run mode to be disabled, since `AGENT_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_DRY_RUN` currently defaults to `true`.
- Update matching tests, especially [`envelope.test.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/__tests__/envelope.test.ts#L871-L874).

Sepo is dispatching follow-up automation.

| Source | Next | Target | Round | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| orchestrate | implement | Issue #155 | 2 / 40 | Dispatched |

Reason: agent planner selected implement: Issue #155 is a small, self-contained default/configuration change with no parent plan and no existing open PR found.

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777964604944 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUzNjI1MjAzMzc6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6MTU1OmltcGxlbWVudDoxNTU6Mg -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-155/codex-25362572249`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/157

Changed the packaged automation defaults so missing AGENT_AUTOMATION_MODE now resolves to agent for entry, label, approval, and router paths, and changed AGENT_PROJECT_MANAGEMENT_APPLY_LABELS to default true while keeping dry-run protection. Updated the configuration/orchestrator/project-management docs and focused tests; verified with npm --prefix .agent run build, node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/envelope.test.js, and node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/apply-project-management-labels-cli.test.js.

title: Nit: change and confirm default values for variables
